title: wendlandia tinctoria subsp. handelii
intro: Wendlandia tinctoria subsp. handelii, also known as Handel's wendlandia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Handel's wendlandia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and stems are used in herbal preparations to create teas, tonics, and other remedies.
